stories.title: Warren invites Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang to Senate hearing on China AI chip sales
stories.summary: Sen. Elizabeth Warren is pressing Jensen Huang's Nvidia over export controls, China sales, Trump and data-center policy as Congress scrutinizes the AI chip boom.

stories.title: Broadcom Is Eschewing Acquisitions in Favor of AI Organic Growth

stories.summary: Broadcom CEO Hock Tan discusses the "leap of faith" the company took when starting its work with Anthropic on chips a year ago, describing it as a "great bet." (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.title: Fuel Shocks, Rising Prices Threaten India’s Consumption Growth

stories.title: US-Iran Talks Stall After Hezbollah Rejects Truce
stories.summary: There was no sign of progress in ceasefire talks between the US and Iran after the worst burst of violence in weeks and as the Tehran-backed Hezbollah militia rejected on Thursday a US-brokered truce in Lebanon. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.title: Trump announces $700m coal investment using wartime powers

stories.title: Gold Steadies as Uncertainty Surrounds Progress in US-Iran Talks
stories.summary: Gold was little changed as uncertainty persisted over progress in US-Iran talks to end the war that’s roiled global markets.

stories.title: Sempra Unit Starts Producing LNG at New Export Plant in Mexico
stories.summary: Sempra Infrastructure said it began producing liquefied natural gas from Mexico’s first West Coast export terminal, with plans to ultimately ship the fuel to Asia in a move that could add relief to a market hurt by tightened global supply due to the Iran war.

stories.summary: Oil steadied after its first decline this week, as optimism over US-Iran peace talks weighed against uncertainty surrounding a ceasefire deal between Israel and Lebanon.

stories.title: Broadcom Sinks After Disappointing AI Chip Outlook

stories.summary: Michael Saylor built Strategy Inc. around a straightforward idea: raise money to buy Bitcoin, then never sell it. Over time, that simple bet has turned far more complicated.
